title: 日本ダービーの後に・瞳に映ったもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo laughs triumphantly in the winner's
circle after her victory in the Japanese Derby
before cutting her moment in the limelight short
and running off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she wanted to distract the reporters from
Special Week, who left crying because of her loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, King Halo receives a call from her
mother, who chastises her behavior and praises
Special Week's efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since her mother is still unwilling to recognize her
skill, King Halo vows to win the final race of the
Triple Crown, the Kikuka Sho.
